codes.title: DELAY DURATION UP TO 3MINS
codes.description: Flight departure within 3 minutes of STD
codes.details: Flight departure within 3 minutes of STD irrespective of delay reason

codes.title: No Delay Code
codes.description: No delay code received in Neo

codes.title: Inefficient coordination of turnaround activities
codes.description: Inefficient coordination by aircraft dispatcher [AUH ONLY]
codes.details: Dispatch errors; Inefficient coordination of turnaround activities; Late initiation of no-show guest baggage offload; late arrival of aircraft dispatcher

codes.title: STANDBY DELAY CODE
codes.description: Standby delay code while delay reason under investigation
codes.details: To be re-allocated within 24 hours of departure; FO delay not accepted by PIC prior to departure (under investigation)

codes.title: GATE/STAND AVAILABILITY
codes.description: No gate or stand availability due to own airline activity
codes.details: Awaiting stand at departure station

codes.title: Tactical ground hold
codes.description: Tactical ground hold due stand availability
codes.details: Awaiting stand/slot at destination station

codes.title: CDCP
codes.description: Company Departure Control Programme
codes.details: Planned delay initiated by NOC to protect guest- and/or baggage connectivity during mass disruption

codes.title: SECURITY
codes.description: AvSec Checks
codes.details: Extraordinary AvSec checks required

codes.title: INSUFFICIENT SCHEDULED GROUND TIME
codes.description: Ground time less than declared standard ground time due base schedule
codes.details: Built into base schedule (use 09B for changes initiated by NOC resulting in less than SGT turn time)

codes.title: Insufficient ground time – NOC initiated
codes.description: Ground time less than declared standard ground time due NOC initiated aircraft/time changes
codes.details: Aircraft or STD/STA changes initiated by NOC resulting in less than SGT turn time (use 09A for base schedule turn time below SGT)

codes.title: LATE CHECK IN
codes.description: Acceptance of guests after flight closure for on-schedule ops
codes.details: VIPs; Standby processing

codes.title: Late acceptance – abnormal ops
codes.description: Acceptance of guests after flight closure for abnormal ops
codes.details: Late guest acceptance from another delayed/cancelled/overbooked flight; Guests delayed due to landside/ground transportation/weather

codes.title: LATE CHECK IN
codes.description: Congestion at check-in area
codes.details: Lack of staff; Group check-in (use 87A for capacity constraints)

codes.title: CHECK IN ERROR
codes.description: Incorrectly processed passenger or baggage details
codes.details: Incurred at station; Incurred via other channels (use 92R when caused by previous station's errors)

codes.title: OVER SALES
codes.description: Booking errors – not resolved at check-in
codes.details: Reconciliation of overbooking (e.g. offloading, down/upgrading)

codes.title: BOARDING
codes.description: Boarding errors/discrepancies
codes.details: Boarding error by gate staff; Guest figure discrepancies; Ground services initiated headcount

codes.title: Paging/Missing passenger
codes.description: Paging/Missing checked-in passenger without baggage offload
codes.details: Guest arriving at gate after deadline

codes.title: Slow (de-)boarding
codes.description: Slow (de-)boarding
codes.details: Slow (de-)boarding; Group processing; Excessive wheelchairs ex inbound only (Use 16C for outbound wheelchairs)

codes.title: Hand luggage issues
codes.description: Hand luggage issues during boarding
codes.details: Excess hand luggage retrieval during boarding

codes.title: Seating issues
codes.description: Seating issues during boarding
codes.details: Guest seating problems caused by editing (use 92R when caused by previous station's errors)

codes.title: Documentation issues
codes.description: Documentation issues during boarding (passport, visa, boarding pass)
codes.details: Slow documentation check; Gate offloading of locally checked-in guest/baggage due to incorrect documentation

codes.title: COMMERCIAL PUBLICITY/GUEST CONVENIENCE
codes.description: Commercial publicity, VIP, press handling
codes.details: Commercial publicity; Press or media activities; VIP handling

codes.title: Guest convenience
codes.description: Guest convenience, missing property or travel documents
codes.details: Passenger searching for missing property/document

codes.title: Special needs handling
codes.description: Special needs handling
codes.details: Disabled/Wheelchair guest handling; slow embarkation (for late reporting of handling staff use 34A; for late disembarkation of wheelchairs from inbound flight use 15C)

codes.title: Gate medical assessment
codes.description: Gate medical assessment or medical offload
codes.details: Assessment and/or involuntary offloading of guest (incl. baggage) due medical reasons at the gate (use 16J for onboard medical assessment/offload)

codes.title: Abnormal guest handling
codes.description: Abnormal guest handling
codes.details: Repatriation/Deportation handling; Inadmissible handling; Disruptive guest handling

codes.title: Guest seating on board
codes.description: Guest refusing to sit in assigned seat
codes.details: Guest refusing to sit in assigned seat (use 15E when caused by editing issues)

codes.title: Voluntary offload
codes.description: Voluntary offload for personal reasons
codes.details: Voluntary offload for personal reasons

codes.title: Guest settling on board
codes.description: Slow settling of guests on board
codes.details: Slow settling of guests on board

codes.title: Guest boarding process
codes.description: Maintaining standard guest boarding process to protect boarding related NPS
codes.details: Maintaining standard guest boarding process to protect boarding related NPS

codes.title: Onboard medical assessment
codes.description: Onboard medical assessment or medical offload
codes.details: Assessment and/or involuntary offloading of guest (incl. baggage) due medical reasons onboard the aircraft (use 16D for boarding gate medical assessment/offload)

codes.title: CATERING ORDER
codes.description: Late or incorrect order given to supplier

codes.details: Late/Incorrect NOTOC presented to LC/loadmaster/flight crew

codes.description: Late delivery of cargo/mail from warehouse (cargo)

codes.title: Transit cargo

codes.title: CARGO AND MAIL LATE ACCEPTANCE

codes.description: Late acceptance of cargo for commercial reasons
codes.details: Acceptance of cargo after deadline requested by Cargo Commercial

codes.title: CARGO AND MAIL INADEQUATE PACKING
codes.description: Re-packaging and/or re-labelling of cargo and mail
codes.details: Load shifting en-route to aircraft; Dangerous goods insufficiently labeled

codes.description: Incorrect contour/build of ULD
codes.details: Incorrect contour/build of ULD

codes.title: LATE/INACCURATE AIRCRAFT DOCUMENTATION
codes.description: Late/inaccurate weight and balance documentation from local station
codes.details: Late/incorrect load sheet (local load control); Late/incorrect LIR; Incorrect data in DCS; Late/incorrect passenger documents

codes.title: W&B documentation – CLC
codes.description: Late/inaccurate weight and balance documentation from CLC
codes.details: Late/incorrect load sheet (CLC); Late/incorrect LIR (CLC); Incorrect data in DCS (CLC); Only applicable when information sent to CLC by station on time

codes.title: LOADING/UNLOADING
codes.description: Special/Bulky load handling
codes.details: Special/Bulky cargo difficult to load/unload/move (no pre-notification received)

codes.title: Loading staff issues
codes.description: Late, lack of, or errors from loading staff
codes.details: Late loaders; Lack of loading staff; Incorrect loading (e.g. not according to load plan)

codes.title: Manual loading/unloading
codes.description: Manual loading/unloading
codes.details: Extra time required due manual loading/unloading of containerized aircraft (e.g. PDU in-op)

codes.title: Narrow-body high-density baggage
codes.description: Additional time taken to maximize baggage uplift on narrow-body
codes.details: Extra time required due to high volume of hold baggage given hold space constraint (e.g. 300+ bags on A320 or A321)

codes.title: LOADING EQUIPMENT
codes.description: Late, lack of, or breakdown of loading equipment
codes.details: Late/Incorrect equipment; Lack/Breakdown of equipment (e.g. high loader, tugs)

codes.title: SERVICING EQUIPMENT
codes.description: Late, lack of, or breakdown of servicing equipment; Late, lack of, or errors from servicing staff
codes.details: Late/Incorrect equipment; Lack/Breakdown of equipment (e.g. guest stairs, guest coaches, toilet/water servicing); late/lack of crew transport provision

codes.title: AIRCRAFT CLEANING
codes.description: Late or inadequate cleaning

codes.title: Special cleaning
codes.description: Special cleaning requirements
codes.details: Extraordinary additional cleaning required (e.g. soiled seats); Late cleaning due aircraft change/off-schedule operations

codes.title: FUELLING/DEFUELLING
codes.description: Late or incorrect fuelling
codes.details: Late fuel truck/refueller; Lack/Breakdown of fuel truck; Fuelling error/spill

codes.title: Slow fuelling
codes.description: Slow fuelling
codes.details: Slow fuelling due operational requirements, local requirements, weather

codes.title: CATERING
codes.description: Lack of or breakdown of catering equipment; Late, lack of, or errors from catering staff
codes.details: Lack/Breakdown of equipment; Insufficient/Incorrect catering; Lack of catering staff; Late loading

codes.title: ULD
codes.description: Lack of and/or unserviceable ULDs/pallets
codes.details: Lack of and/or unserviceable ULDs/pallets

codes.title: TECHNICAL RAMP EQUIPMENT
codes.description: Late, lack of, or breakdown of technical ramp equipment

codes.details: Aircraft towed late to departure stand due late/lack/breakdown of technical ramp equipment; Errors from staff (use 89C for late tow caused by ATC holds)

codes.title: TECHNICAL DEFECTS

codes.title: Cabin defects

codes.details: Cabin outfit malfunctions (e.g. galleys, seats)

codes.title: IFE defects

codes.description: Technical documentation associated with defects identified during transit

codes.title: SCHEDULED MAINTENANCE
codes.description: Late release from scheduled maintenance
codes.details: Work overrun; Late availability or lack of manpower; Awaiting staff/equipment for towing operations

codes.title: Maintenance documentation/personnel
codes.description: Technical documentation/personnel issues during scheduled maintenance
codes.details: Late/Incorrect completion of documentation; Awaiting engineer sign-off; Lack/Late completion of ETL (use 58A for ETL sync failure)

codes.title: NON SCHEDULED MAINTENANCE
codes.description: Special checks and/or additional works beyond normal maintenance schedule
codes.details: Special checks (e.g. ADs); Repairs due aircraft damage

codes.title: SPARES AND MAINTENANCE
codes.description: Spares and maintenance equipment, lack of, or breakdown
codes.details: Lack of spares, lack of and/or breakdown of specialist equipment required for defect rectification

codes.title: AOG SPARES
codes.description: Spares to be carried to another station
codes.details: Awaiting AOG spare(s) to be carried to another station

codes.title: AIRCRAFT CHANGE
codes.description: Aircraft change for technical reasons
codes.details: Aircraft change for technical reasons (e.g. prolonged or rolling technical delay)

codes.title: SCHEDULED CABIN CONFIGURATION
codes.description: Guest special need works
codes.details: Stretcher installation/removal (use 99A when scheduled ground time is less than 3hrs); Medical equipment installation/removal

codes.title: APU INOPERATIVE / ENGINE START PRIOR PUSHBACK
codes.description: APU inoperative (notified in advance) / engine start on stand
codes.details: APU inoperative (notified in advance) and/or engine start on stand (use 41A for first occurrence of APU defect, use 39A for technical equipment issues)

codes.title: DAMAGE DURING FLIGHT OPERATIONS

codes.title: Damage – flight ops SOPs
codes.description: Damage & damage assessment due incorrect application of flight operations SOPs
codes.details: Overweight/heavy/hard landing; Collision during taxiing; Aircraft overrun runway/taxiway; Tail scrapes

codes.title: Damage – guest caused

codes.details: Damaged seat / table; damage to lavatory caused by passengers

codes.title: DAMAGE DURING GROUND OPERATIONS
codes.description: Damage & damage assessment during ground operations ramp activity at station
codes.details: Loading/Unloading; Loading equipment; Technical ramp equipment; Catering equipment; Stairs/Air bridge; Towing operations; FOD in ramp area

codes.title: Damage – previous sector
codes.description: Damage assessment during ground operations with damage caused on previous sectors
codes.details: Aircraft damage caused by ground operations identified at station with damage having occurred on previous sector

codes.title: GPS NAVIGATION FAULT

codes.details: Inaccurate aircraft positioning data as a result of external interference / airfield environment e.g. GPS Spoofing/Jamming

codes.title: DEPARTURE CONTROL

codes.title: FLIGHT PLANNING SYSTEM

codes.title: COMMUNICATION
codes.description: Failure of airline's communication systems at airport
codes.details: Failure of airline's communication systems (e.g. eATL connectivity; ETL synchronizing failure | use 87B for airport communication system failures)

codes.title: Regulatory System Outage
codes.description: Regulatory System Outage

codes.title: FLIGHT DOCUMENTATION
codes.description: Late completion of, alterations to, or errors with flight plan

codes.title: Missing/errors with flight documentation

codes.description: Extra time taken to connect guests in addition to pre-approved load connection time
codes.details: Flight hold awaiting guests and/or baggage from another late inbound Etihad flight in addition to pre-approved load connection time by NOC

codes.title: Awaiting guests from late inbound
codes.description: Awaiting guests (incl. baggage) from another late inbound Etihad flight
codes.details: Flight hold awaiting guests (incl. baggage) from another late inbound Etihad flight (detail in SI section how many guests and which flight)

codes.title: Awaiting guests – other airline
codes.description: Awaiting guest and/or baggage from another airlines late inbound flight
codes.details: Flight hold awaiting guest and/or baggage from another airlines (partner airline or code-share) inbound flight

codes.title: THROUGH CHECK-IN ERROR (TCI)
codes.description: Guest check-in error at originating station
codes.details: Delays/Offloads due incorrect/incomplete documentation (e.g. API, boarding passes, visa, passport); Oversize/Pieces hand luggage

codes.title: AIRCRAFT ROTATION
codes.description: Late arrival of aircraft from another flight or previous sector
codes.details: Applicable to all delays caused by late arrival of aircraft from another flight or previous sector

codes.title: CABIN CREW ROTATION
codes.description: Awaiting cabin crew from another flight
codes.details: Awaiting cabin crew (only) from another flight (detail in SI section & daily shift report inbound flight number)

codes.title: CREW ROTATION
codes.description: Awaiting flight crew (or entire crew) from another flight
codes.details: Awaiting flight crew (or entire crew) from another flight (including deadheading crew members)

codes.title: OPERATIONS CONTROL
codes.description: Abnormal operations
codes.details: Re-routing; Diversions; Flight consolidation

codes.title: Aircraft change – non-technical
codes.description: Aircraft changes for reasons other than technical
codes.details: Aircraft change for non-technical reasons (e.g. aircraft ground/flight damage) or subsequent aircraft changes due AOG situations (use 46R for initial aircraft change due technical)

codes.title: Non-Mandatory Technical Defect Rectification
codes.description: Non-Mandatory Technical Defect Rectification
codes.details: Apply if the flight is held from Operations Control to rectify technical defects (MEL could be applied)

codes.title: MISCELLANEOUS
codes.description: No suitable code
codes.details: This code shall be used only when it is clear that a reason cannot be matched to a code above (explain details in SI section, daily shift report)
